center.name: 印度洋
center.summary: 印度洋是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联19种鸟类，包括Christmas imperial pigeon、小凤头燕鸥、普通燕鷗等19种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|Map of Christmas Island The species is endemic to the tropical Christmas Island in the eastern Indian Ocean. It predominantly inhabits the evergreen inland plateau, but is found throughout the island. Though about a third of this was cut down for phosphate mining, introduced Jamaican cherry trees have recolonized many areas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Comoros Islands in the south western Indian Ocean

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits areas to the west of the ˞Indian Ocean

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits Madagascar and the Comoro Islands in the Indian Ocean

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It can be found in the southern Atlantic Ocean, the southern Indian Ocean, and the Southern Ocean

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the islands of the western Indian Ocean where it occurs on Madagascar, the Aldabra Group and the Glorioso Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the South Atlantic and islands of the southern Indian Ocean and south-eastern Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: assimilis elegans }} The subantarctic shearwater (Puffinus elegans) is a small bird species which breeds in Tristan da Cunha, islands of the southern Indian Ocean and New Zealand Subantarctic Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|220x220px|Fighting, Madagascar The common myna is native to Asia, with its initial home range spanning Iran, Pakistan, India, Nepal, Bhutan, Bangladesh and Sri Lanka, Afghanistan, Uzbekistan, Tajikistan, Turkmenistan, Myanmar, Malaysia, Singapore, peninsular Thailand, Indochina, Japan (both mainland Japan and the Ryukyu Islands) and China. thumb|left|A common myna as an invasive species in Gülhane Park, Turkey thumb|Visiting a home garden in Colombo, [[Sri Lanka]]The common myna has been introduced to many other parts of the world such as Canada, Australia, Turkey, Israel, New Zealand, New Caledonia, Fiji, the United States (South Florida only), South Africa, Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Uzbekistan, Cayman Islands, Islands in the Indian Ocean (the Seychelles – from which it was subsequently eradicated at great expense,{{Cite journal| journal= PLOS ONE|first1=Thomas|last1=Evans|first2=Elena|last2=Angulo|first3=Corey J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in subtropical coastal parts of the world mainly from the Red Sea across the Indian Ocean to the western Pacific, and Australia, with a significant population on the southern coast of the Mediterranean on two islands off the Libyan coast

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: 194–195. Western Asian birds winter in the northern Indian Ocean, and S.h.tibetana appears to be common off East Africa during the Northern Hemisphere winter.Zimmerman et al

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the tropical Atlantic, western Pacific and Indian Oceans

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The slender-billed gull breeds in lagoons and lakes around the Mediterranean Sea and in similar locations in countries bordering the northwestern part of the Indian Ocean

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | year=2010| title= Checklist of the birds of New Zealand, Norfolk and Macquarie Islands, and the Ross Dependency, Antarctica | edition= 4th | location=Wellington, New Zealand | publisher=Te Papa Press and Ornithological Society of New Zealand |pages =136–37 | isbn=978-1-877385-59-9}} |synonyms =Phaethon phoenicuros Gmelin 1789 Phaëthon novae-hollandiae Brandt, 1840 | range_map = Redtailedtropicbirdrge.png | range_map_caption = Range (in pink) }} The red-tailed tropicbird (Phaethon rubricauda) is a seabird native to tropical parts of the Indian and Pacific Oceans

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species has a wide distribution through tropical and subtropical regions of the Atlantic, Indian and Pacific oceans, it is a year-round resident in Cabo Verde, China, French Guiana, Indonesia, Japan, Malaysia, Mauritania, Morocco, Saint Helena, Ascension and Tristan da Cunha, Senegal and Taiwan, it breeds in the Macaronesian Islands and continental Portugal in the Atlantic; and from eastern China and the Bonin Islands, east to the Hawaiian Islands, the Marquesas Islands, the United States Minor Outlying Islands and Kiribati in the Pacific

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The northern rockhopper penguin (Eudyptes moseleyi), also known as Moseley's rockhopper penguin, Moseley's penguin, or Tristan penguin, is a penguin species native to the southern Indian and Atlantic Oceans

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to South Atlantic islands and islands of the subantarctic southern Indian Ocean, islands and islets off New Zealand and south-eastern Australian islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: sumatrana, in the Andaman Islands, India | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | taxon = Sterna sumatrana | authority = Raffles, 1822 }} The black-naped tern (Sterna sumatrana) is an oceanic tern mostly found in tropical and subtropical areas of the Indian Ocean and western Pacific Ocean

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: There are major nesting populations in the tropical Pacific Ocean, such as Hawaii and the Galápagos Islands; in the Indian Ocean, colonies can be found in the Seychelles (on Aldabra and Aride Islands) and Mauritius, and there is a tiny population in the South Atlantic, mostly on and around [[St
